Container.Name: ARK-Server-Manager
Container.Overview: Web control panel for ARK: Survival Ascended (POK) and Survival Evolved (hermsi) dedicated servers. Manages every setting, mods, clusters, live RCON, and scheduled tasks, and spawns one container per game server. Requires a companion docker-socket-proxy on the 'ark-net' network.

Config.Name: App data
Config.Description: Use /mnt/cache (the disk), not /mnt/user (FUSE), so reflink game-file caching works.

Config.Name: HOST_DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Host path of the app data dir — the daemon resolves it for the game-server bind mounts. Must match the App data path above.

Config.Name: PUBLIC_BASE_URL
Config.Description: How you reach the manager, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3000 — used for links and each game container's Unraid WebUI button.

Config.Name: SECRETS_KEY
Config.Description: 64 hex chars (32 bytes). Generate: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: JWT_SECRET
Config.Description: Random secret for session tokens. Generate: openssl rand -hex 24
